defense_rules: Conclusion must be traceable to §4-5 analysis
No new claims not in body
Benefits and risks both stated
No 'bald statements' without evidence reference
Device identity anchor: name, model/variant list, EMDN, MDR Class+Rule
EVERY product variant: design rationale, safety/performance impact
Intended purpose specificity: patient population, clinical setting, intended users
Novel features: explicit description + evidence support
Device name IDENTICAL across all sections
Answer 3 core questions: standard of care? benchmarks? gap?
PICO-based search strategy documented
≥2 databases searched
PRISMA flow diagram
Safety/Performance Endpoint table with benchmark values + sources
Equivalence: 3-pillar comparison complete
Literature: reproducible search
Clinical investigation: study design, sample size, endpoints
Evidence appraisal: quality scoring, relevance assessment
Every claim linked to specific evidence source
Benefits quantified
Risks mapped to RMF hazard IDs
Residual risk acceptability justified
Alternative therapy comparison
Every N/A justified with device-specific technical rationale
Risk management cross-reference
MDR Annex I numbering alignment
Standards references up-to-date
PMCF plan: next evaluation date, planned studies, data sources
Trigger conditions for re-evaluation
PMCF-CER feedback loop
PMS data: complaint trends, vigilance summary, CAPA
IFU: intended purpose, contraindications, warnings, precautions
Symbols per ISO 15223-1
Language per MDR Art 10(11)
UDI per MDR Art 27
Clinical study references in product information
